curation_notes: Patch commit is a squash merge of PR #10873. Two source files were modified, both adding the Jinja2 |e escape filter to template variables. Locations derived directly from the patch diff: FailureCard.__init__ in cards/__init__.py uses {{ STACKTRACE }} without escaping, and _build_step_card in steps/ingest/__init__.py uses {{SCHEMA}} without escaping. Checked sibling step modules (steps/__init__.py, steps/automl/__init__.py) — none contain the same unescaped template pattern. Pre-assigned vuln_class xss is correct: the fix adds HTML escaping to prevent script injection via template variables.
